title: Wels、Upper Austria — 生活費、住宅、移住ガイド [2026]
description: Wels、Upper Austriaの完全ガイド：生活費、住宅価格、近隣地域、リモートワークの準備、移住のヒント。
content:
概要

WelsはUpper Austriaにある人口63,181の都市です。A historic city in Upper Austria with a well-preserved medieval old town, known for its agricultural trade fairs and the Wels Castle.

Last updated: July 13, 2026
